{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231754411B6DE09D9C223C7CCA57"}"},"total":1401},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7523557499351859993","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"每个故事都很好，男主都很爱女主，特别是保姆那个故事结尾男女主葬在了男主选的风水宝地，都死了还在保护女主。作者大大，希望是切片男主，因为深情不可辜负"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1751718250,"group_id":"7458220020531727422","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0fQyRI0tl2MnfOBgvAVxu9AkPxocyVvW0ju/WWV50Rz","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789360&x-signature=kF0qy%2FZCs5KDejK6auO%2FMmXI91c%3D","user_id":"1538943756283550","user_name":"爱吃脆皮大肠的李重茂"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1538943756283550","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7458220020531727422","book_info":{"abstract":"【快穿+女主娇纵美人又作又坏+男主深情偏执恋爱脑+甜宠1v1+多修罗场+双洁】
恶毒女配是男女主相爱路上最常见的阻碍，其结局往往也没有例外——
女配失去男主真挚的爱，在冰冷的豪宅守着金山银山度过孤独的余生。
欣然扮演恶毒女配的江辞晚表示∶我当然不是为了钱，主要平时就爱做坏事！
①穿成不被爱的豪门太太。真爱回归后，被扫地出门，离婚收场。
于是，江辞晚在家作天作地，横行霸道，胡作非为。她不高兴，谁都别想好过！
可后来，被她狠狠欺负的男人却死缠烂打，“这个家里不能没有你！”
②穿成被戏耍的贫穷少女。自以为攀上高枝，得意忘形，没想到一切只是赌约，没多久就被无情抛弃。
于是，江辞晚将嫌贫爱富贯彻到底，狮子大开口∶要这个，要那个……我全都想要！
可后来，被她算计索取的富二代男友却愈发宠溺，“只要不分手，宝宝想要什么我都给。”
……
最后，面对一次次崩坏的剧情以及赖上她就甩不掉的男主，江辞晚只能勉为其难把钱和人都划入自己的小金库范围。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/45cb394e41064aef65d40d5a11fa3009","author":"云叙川","author_id":"","book_id":"7458220020531727422","book_name":"恶毒女配又在作？过来我哄哄","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":24,"name":"快穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=24&name=快穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":473,"name":"豪门世家","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=473&name=豪门世家&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7471150585501205054","read_count":"81667","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"772831"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.2","serial_count":"393","tags":"快穿,现代言情,甜宠,豪门世家,双洁,1v1","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1a4ad43ad89eae5dcd68eff238406dc1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779443681&x-signature=LBZCtLkEAlH%2BR3a9cAEW23SXe2s%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3046066750226976","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"88"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231754411B6DE09D9C223C7CCA57"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_cou
